scripts.build: npm run build -w @ai-vsa/shared && npm run build -w @ai-vsa/database && npm run build -w @ai-vsa/agent && npm run build -w @ai-vsa/api && npm run build -w @ai-vsa/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w @ai-vsa/shared && npm run build -w @ai-vsa/agent && npm run build -w @ai-vsa/database && npm run dev -w @ai-vsa/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @ai-vsa/shared && npm run typecheck -w @ai-vsa/database && npm run typecheck -w @ai-vsa/agent && npm run typecheck -w @ai-vsa/api && npm run typecheck -w @ai-vsa/web
